onboarding.title: Welcome to ReGen PEPT
onboarding.subtitle: Let's set up your profile to get started.

adverse_events.title: Adverse Event Logger
adverse_events.success_desc: Your medical team has been notified.
adverse_events.disclaimer: Use this form only if you experience unexpected side effects. If it is a medical emergency, contact emergency services immediately.
adverse_events.symptoms_placeholder: Describe what you feel and since when...

bloodwork.title: Upload Lab Results
bloodwork.description: Send your most recent bloodwork results so your physician can adjust your treatment.
bloodwork.alert_missing_fields: Please select a physician and attach a file.

daily_checkin.title: Wellness Daily Check-in
daily_checkin.success_desc: You have recorded your symptoms for today. Check back tomorrow.
daily_checkin.notes_placeholder: Anything else you want to share about today?
daily_checkin.error_saving: There was an error saving your check-in.

prescriptions.title: My Active Recommendations
prescriptions.refill_alert_desc: Your treatment is about to finish. Request renewal now (shipping can take up to 10 days).

medical_team.title: My Medical Team
medical_team.empty: You do not have an assigned physician yet.

refill.title: Request Renewal (Refill)
refill.success_desc: Your physician will review the request soon.
refill.description: Running out of your formula? Request a renewal directly from your physician.

symptoms.title: Symptom Journal
symptoms.success_desc: Your physician will see this progress on their monitor.
symptoms.side_effects_placeholder: E.g., Mild nausea in the morning...
symptoms.alert_select_physician: Please select a physician to send the report.

clinic.title: Clinic Portal
clinic.subtitle: B2B Management, Orders and Control Panel.

supplier.title: Supplier Portal
supplier.subtitle: Corporate B2B control panel (Raw materials sale and mass distribution).

pharmacy.title: Compounding Pharmacy
pharmacy.subtitle: Dual B2B Management: Purchases (APIs) and Sales (Magistral Formulas).

settings.profile_desc: Update your personal and professional information.

overview.desktop_only_desc: Please access from a computer to manage prescriptions.
overview.drafts_banner_desc: Complete and send them to continue the process.
overview.new_rx_desc: Create a prescription for patient or clinic supply.
overview.builder_form_desc: Fill in the data and save it.
overview.no_data_bar: No data to show in the bar.

approvals.title: Renewal Requests
approvals.empty: No pending renewal requests at this time.

builder.title: Prescription Builder
builder.scan_desc: If you have a handwritten or printed prescription, upload it here. The system will attempt to auto-fill patient data and medications.
builder.add_item_alert: Add at least one product or protocol.
builder.saved_draft_success: Prescription created and saved as draft.
builder.add_item_before_send: Add at least one item before sending.
builder.select_recipient_alert: Select at least one recipient (patient or wholesaler).
builder.specify_patient_alert: Specify the patient (email or registration) before sending.
builder.duplicate_item: This item is already in the prescription.
builder.previous_items_loaded: Items from previous prescription loaded into draft.
builder.formula_name_req: Please provide a name for the formula.
builder.formula_ingredient_req: Please add at least one active ingredient.
builder.formula_dose_req: Please provide valid doses for all ingredients.
builder.formula_added: Compounded formula added to prescription cart.
builder.no_full_address_warning: ⚠️ The patient does not have a complete address in the current draft. Do you want to ship to the Clinic?
builder.clinic_ship_info: ℹ️ **Ship to Clinic**: The products in this prescription will be delivered to the physical address of the doctor's supervising medical clinic.
builder.share_rx_desc: The physician explicitly decides who receives this prescription. It can be the patient, one or multiple wholesalers, or both.
builder.patient_wont_see_rx: The patient will not see this prescription
builder.no_wholesalers_registered: No wholesalers registered on the platform.
builder.no_history_found: No previous prescriptions found for this physician.

bulk_builder.no_source_alert: Select at least one source or add your own item.
bulk_builder.success_alert: Bulk order sent to admin. {{lines}} lines, {{units}} total units.
bulk_builder.no_rx: You do not have any prescriptions assigned yet.
bulk_builder.own_stock_desc: Add products or protocols for your own clinic stock, independently of prescriptions or orders.
bulk_builder.aggregated_view_desc: Aggregated view of all selected items (deduplicated and summed):
bulk_builder.select_sources_preview: Select sources or add own items to see the summary.
bulk_builder.submitted_success: Bulk Order successfully sent to Admin
bulk_builder.submitted_success_sub: The Atlas Health team has been notified and will process your order.

alerts.label_saved: Label saved successfully and sent to physician.

timeline_notes.kit_status_updated: Kit status updated to: {{status}} by wholesaler.
timeline_notes.label_uploaded: PDF pickup label uploaded by wholesaler.
timeline_notes.results_uploaded: PDF diagnostic results uploaded by wholesaler.
timeline_notes.recommendations_uploaded: Associated pharmacological recommendations uploaded by wholesaler.
